predictions.source_quote: We estimate a 2% drop in GDP between Q3 2022 and Q3 2023.

predictions.forecast_value: persistently above 2% target; central banks stop hiking before inflation returns to 2%
predictions.source_quote: We expect inflation to cool but stay persistently higher than central bank targets of 2%.

predictions.variable: Federal Reserve policy rate hiking cycle
predictions.forecast_value: Fed stops hiking and activity stabilizes in 2023, without inflation returning to 2%
predictions.source_quote: We expect them to stop hiking and activity to stabilize in 2023.

predictions.forecast_value: long-term yields rising further as term premium returns
predictions.source_quote: We see long-term yields rising further as term premium returns.

predictions.forecast_value: market pricing of rate hikes is unrealistically hawkish; actual hikes will be less
predictions.source_quote: We believe market pricing of the Bank of England's rate hikes is unrealistically hawkish in light of deteriorating growth.
